$comment: Periodic Notes -> daily notes enabled. Schema verified against the SHIPPED main.js of the resolved release (tag 1.0.0-beta.3), which uses the calendarSets model (NOT the older flat daily/weekly shape). Keys: each period lives under calendarSets[].{day,week,month,...} as {enabled, openAtStartup, format, folder, templatePath}. 'id' must equal 'activeCalendarSet'. Edit the folder/format below to taste; add a week/month block to enable more periods.
